formulas.name: Marketing Mix Formula
formulas.variables: Product: Product characteristics, Price: Price strategy, Promotion: Marketing communications, Place: Distribution channels
formulas.notes: Identify the 4 Ps to understand the marketing strategy of an organization

formulas.name: Segmentation, Targeting, and Positioning (STP) Formula
formulas.variables: Segmentation: Divide the market into distinct groups, Targeting: Select the target group, Positioning: Create a unique image in the target group's mind
formulas.notes: Understand how to apply the STP framework in a marketing strategy

formulas.name: Product Life Cycle Formula
formulas.variables: Introduction: Product launch, Growth: Increasing sales, Maturity: Peak sales, Decline: Decreasing sales
formulas.notes: Understand how a product goes through different stages of its life cycle

formulas.name: Marketing Research Formula
formulas.formula: Problem identification, Research design, Data collection, Data analysis, Report preparation
formulas.variables: Problem identification: Identify the research problem, Research design: Determine the research approach, Data collection: Collect relevant data, Data analysis: Analyze the data, Report preparation: Present the research findings
formulas.notes: Understand the different stages involved in the marketing research process

formulas.name: SWOT Analysis Formula
formulas.variables: Strengths: Internal strengths, Weaknesses: Internal weaknesses, Opportunities: External opportunities, Threats: External threats
formulas.notes: Identify the SWOT factors to understand the marketing strategy of an organization

formulas.name: Boston Consulting Group (BCG) Matrix Formula
formulas.formula: Cash cows, Dogs, Stars, Question marks
formulas.variables: Cash cows: High market share, low growth, Dogs: Low market share, low growth, Stars: High growth, high market share, Question marks: High growth, low market share
formulas.notes: Understand how to apply the BCG matrix in a marketing strategy

formulas.name: Ansoff Matrix Formula
formulas.formula: Market penetration, Market development, Product development, Diversification
formulas.variables: Market penetration: Increase sales in existing market, Market development: Enter a new market, Product development: Introduce a new product, Diversification: Enter a new market with a new product
formulas.notes: Understand how to apply the Ansoff matrix in a marketing strategy
